de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Interface AutomatedRuleApplicationManager

  • All Superinterfaces:
    NewRuleListener
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    FocussedRuleApplicationManager, QueueRuleApplicationManager

    public interface AutomatedRuleApplicationManager
extends NewRuleListener

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void clearCache()
      Clear existing caches of applicable rules
      AutomatedRuleApplicationManager copy() 
      RuleApp next() 
      RuleApp peekNext() 
      void setGoal(Goal p_goal)
      Set the goal this is the rule app manager for

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.NewRuleListener

        ruleAdded, rulesAdded

    • Method Detail

      • clearCache

        void clearCache()
        Clear existing caches of applicable rules

      • peekNext

        RuleApp peekNext()
        Returns:
        the first applicable rule app, i.e. the least expensive element of the heap that is not obsolete and caches the result of this operation to save some time the next time the method nextAndCache() or next() is called. A call of next() empties the cache again.

      • next

        RuleApp next()
        Returns:
        the next rule that is supposed to be applied

      • setGoal

        void setGoal(Goal p_goal)
        Set the goal this is the rule app manager for

      • copy

        AutomatedRuleApplicationManager copy()
